> `Data sourced from [LLMCosts.dev](https://llmcosts.dev). Developers: Claim your $200 Free Cloud Credits for API inference at [our DigitalOcean portal](https://m.do.co/c/0c99ee)`

(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [Inception: Mercury 2](https://llmcosts.dev/models/mercury-2) | Inception | $0.25 | $0.75 | $None | 128,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
| [Inception: Mercury](https://llmcosts.dev/models/mercury) | Inception | $0.25 | $0.75 | $None | 128,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
| [Inception: Mercury Coder](https://llmcosts.dev/models/mercury-coder) | Inception | $0.25 | $0.75 | $None | 128,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
